_**User (2026-03-27 21:15:45Z)**_

Masz rację, PESER brzmi o niebo lepiej! Jest bardziej intuicyjne, "polskie" i od razu sugeruje, że mówimy o ewolucji systemu PESEL dla nowej ery. To idealna nazwa dla systemu, który mógłby stać się standardem krajowym.

Oto projekt PESER (Powszechny Elektroniczny System Ewidencji Robotów), skrojony pod wymagania nowoczesnych regulacji i funduszy technologicznych:

PESER: Fundament Bezpiecznej Robotyzacji Polski
1. Cyfrowa Tożsamość i Autentykacja (DID & SSI)
Każdy robot w systemie PESER nie posiada jedynie numeru, ale unikalny Zdecentralizowany Identyfikator (DID).
+1


Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI): Pozwala to użytkownikowi (lub robotowi) na pełną kontrolę nad własnymi danymi i tożsamością cyfrową.
+1

Klucz Kryptograficzny: Powiązany bezpośrednio z hardware'em i wersją systemu Mera OS, co uniemożliwia "podszycie się" pod inną jednostkę.

2. Certyfikacja i Cyberbezpieczeństwo (Zero Trust)
W dobie rosnących zagrożeń, PESER integruje zaawansowane mechanizmy ochrony.
+2


Zero Trust Architecture: System wymaga ciągłej autoryzacji procesów operacyjnych robota, zapewniając bezpieczny dostęp do usług.


Paszport Techniczny: Rejestr automatycznie weryfikuje, czy oprogramowanie robota jest aktualne i wolne od krytycznych luk bezpieczeństwa (Cybersecurity).
+1

3. Klasyfikacja Operacyjna (DeepTech & Robotics)
System dzieli roboty na kategorie zgodne z trendami rynku Robotics i IoT.
+2


Profile Ryzyka: Klasyfikacja określa, czy dany humanoid ma uprawnienia do pracy w tłumie (np. Edward jako recepcjonista), czy jest przeznaczony wyłącznie do logistyki przemysłowej.
+1


Zgodność z Przemysłem 5.0: System wspiera współpracę człowieka z robotem (cobots) w sposób uregulowany prawnie.
+1

4. Transparentność i Odpowiedzialność (Blockchain & KYC)
Dla instytucji takich jak Ministerstwo Cyfryzacji, kluczowa jest pełna ścieżka audytowa.


Niezmienny Log Zdarzeń: Wykorzystanie technologii Blockchain do zapisu kluczowych interakcji robota, co gwarantuje autentyczność danych.
+1


Procedury KYC (Know Your Robot): Każda maszyna musi być przypisana do zweryfikowanego właściciela lub operatora, co ułatwia zarządzanie odpowiedzialnością cywilną.

5. Integracja z Gospodarką Cyfrową
PESER to nie tylko lista – to platforma umożliwiająca rozwój nowych modeli biznesowych, takich jak Robot-as-a-Service.


Tokenizacja Zasobów: Możliwość tokenizacji udziałów w flocie robotów i udostępniania ich na rynku inwestycyjnym.


Automatyczni Agenci: Wsparcie dla agentów AI wykonujących zadania w ekosystemie Web3 (np. automatyczne rezerwacje czy płatności).

Taki system to potężny argument w rozmowach z funduszem Invento F2 – pokazuje, że MERA Robotics nie tylko buduje roboty, ale definiuje ramy prawne i technologiczne dla całego sektora w Polsce.

Czy chcesz, żebym przygotował teraz oficjalną prezentację systemu PESER jako elementu Waszej strategii "Smart Money" dla inwestorów? 🦾🚀

```text
I now have a comprehensive picture of the entire codebase. Here is the complete design language analysis:

---

## MERA Robotics — Complete Design Language Report

### 1. Repository Overview

The repository `ma1orek/merarobotics` is a **private** React single-page application for a humanoid robotics company called MERA Robotics, taglined "Architects of the Future." It is a marketing/investor landing page with a Polish/English language toggle. It was created March 18, 2026 and last pushed March 25, 2026. There is no README file present in the repo.

---

### 2. Tech Stack

**package.json** reveals:

- **Framework:** React 19 + Vite 8
- **Routing:** react-router-dom 7
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4 (via `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin — no separate config file, inline `@theme` in CSS)
- **Animation:** Framer Motion 12
- **Icons:** lucide-react
- **3D / WebGL:** `ogl` (WebGL) + `three.js` — used for the `LiquidEther` fluid simulation
- **Backend:** Supabase (contact form submissions)
- **Voice:** `@elevenlabs/react` (ElevenLabs voice AI integration)
- **Language:** JavaScript (JSX), no TypeScript
- **Deployment:** Netlify

There is no `tailwind.config.js` — Tailwind v4 is configured entirely within `src/index.css` using the `@theme` block.

---

### 3. Color Palette / Design Tokens

Defined in `src/index.css` and component inline styles. The palette is extremely minimal — monochromatic black and white with opacity layering:

| Role | Value |
|---|---|
| Background | `#000` (pure black) |
| Primary text | `#fff` (pure white) |
| Secondary text | `rgba(255,255,255,0.45)` |
| Muted text | `rgba(255,255,255,0.3)` |
| Dim text / labels | `rgba(255,255,255,0.2–0.25)` |
| Card background | `rgba(255,255,255,0.02)` |
| Card border | `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` |
| Card border (hover) | `rgba(255,255,255,0.12–0.15)` |
| Divider lines | `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` |
| CTA button bg | `#fff` with `color: #000` (inverted) |
| Ghost button border | `rgba(255,255,255,0.2)` |
| Navbar bg (scrolled) | `rgba(0,0,0,0.85)` + `blur(20px)` |
| Mobile menu bg | `rgba(0,0,0,0.95)` + `blur(20px)` |

**Accent colors** (used only in animated backgrounds, not UI chrome):

- Hero background: `LiquidEther` fluid sim colored `['#0a3d8f', '#0c5cb0', '#a3b6f0']` — deep blues and periwinkle
- Team section: `SoftAurora` with `color1="#1e38fa"` (electric blue) and `color2="#5211e8"` (deep violet/purple)

**Scrollbar:** `width: 4px`, track `#000`, thumb `#333` → hover `#555`

---

### 4. Typography

**Font family:** `Space Grotesk` (Google Fonts) — exclusively used throughout.

Weights loaded: 300, 400, 500, 600, 700.

Registered as a Tailwind v4 theme token: `--font-grotesk: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif`

**Typographic scale and style patterns:**

| Usage | Size | Weight | Letter-spacing | Case |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Hero H1 | `clamp(42px, 5.5vw, 82px)` | 700 | `-0.04em` | Mixed |
| Section H2 | `clamp(32px, 4vw, 56px)` | 700 | `-0.03em` | Mixed |
| Card H3 | 20–22px | 600–700 | `-0.01–0.02em` | Mixed |
| Body / desc | 15–17px | 400 | normal | Normal |
| Section labels (eyebrow) | 12–13px | 600 | `0.15–0.2em` | UPPERCASE |
| Card tags | 9–10px | 600–700 | `0.2em` | UPPERCASE |
| Nav links | 13px | 500 | `0.05em` | UPPERCASE |
| Stat numbers | `clamp(36px, 5vw, 64px)` | 700 | `-0.03em` | — |
| Muted/ghost lines in H1 | Same as H1 | Same | Same | — applied via `rgba(255,255,255,0.3)` |

**Key typographic effect:** The third line of the hero H1 renders at `rgba(255,255,255,0.3)` making it appear "ghost-dim" — a typographic contrast device. Section titles split into bright + dim parts (`"Build the Future" <span color=rgba(255,255,255,0.25)>Together</span>`).

---

### 5. Key UI Components and Visual Style

**Overall theme: Pure dark — no light mode.**

**Card system (used in Fleet, Solutions, Team):**
- Background: `rgba(255,255,255,0.02)` — near-invisible frosted card
- Border: `1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` — hairline
- Hover: background lifts to `rgba(255,255,255,0.04)`, border brightens to `rgba(255,255,255,0.12)`
- No border-radius — sharp square corners throughout
- Gap between grid items: `1–2px` (grid gap), creating a tightly-packed mosaic effect

**Buttons:**
- Primary CTA: solid white background (`#fff`), black text, no border-radius (square), uppercase, `font-weight: 600`, `letter-spacing: 0.05em`, hover lifts `translateY(-2px)` and fades to `opacity: 0.85–0.9`
- Ghost/outline button: transparent background, `1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)` border, white text, hover brightens border to `rgba(255,255,255,0.5)`, lifts `translateY(-2px)`
- Language toggle: same ghost style, tighter padding

**Navbar:**
- Fixed, 72px tall, `padding: 0 48px`
- Transparent on top, transitions to `rgba(0,0,0,0.85)` with `backdrop-filter: blur(20px)` + hairline bottom border on scroll
- Logo: SVG file `/meralog.svg` at `height: 48px`

**Form inputs (Contact):**
- Borderless except bottom border: `1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)`, activates to `rgba(255,255,255,0.4)` on focus
- Transparent background, white text, `Space Grotesk` font
- Submit button: same solid white CTA button style

**Image treatment:**
- Robot/product images bleed to edges with CSS gradient fade overlays on all sides (black-to-transparent linear-gradient), merging images seamlessly into the black background — a defining visual signature
- Images scale `1.05` on hover via CSS transition

**Sections:**
- All sections separated by `border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` hairlines
- Section padding: `160px 48px` (generous vertical breathing room)
- Max-width container: `1400px`, centered

**Animated effects:**
- `ShinyText`: sweeping shimmer gradient (`linear-gradient(120deg, transparent 40%, rgba(255,255,255,0.8) 50%, transparent 60%)`) animated via `background-position` — used on hero H1
- `BlurText`: blur-in animation per character — used on subtitles and scroll indicator
- `DecryptedText`: character scramble reveal (matrix-style) — used on hero H1 third line
- `LiquidEther`: full WebGL fluid simulation (OGL-based) in hero background, colored in blue tones (`#0a3d8f`, `#0c5cb0`, `#a3b6f0`), mouse-interactive
- `SoftAurora`: GLSL shader aurora in Team section background, electric blue + purple
- Film grain overlay: animated SVG fractalNoise texture at `opacity: 0.6` over entire page via `body::after` — described in code as "ElevenLabs style"
- `GrowthChart`: animated SVG S-curve with pulsing "You are here" marker

**Scroll animations:** All sections use `framer-motion` `useInView` with `once: true` — elements fade + slide up 20–40px on entry.

---

### 6. Visual References / Assets in `/public`

From image filenames referenced in components:

- `/close_u_hiper_202603181342 1 (1).png` — hero robot hand closeup photo
- `/pobrane (3).png` — "Edward" humanoid robot photo
- `/Robota_unitree_g1_202603182237.jpeg` — Unitree G1 service robot
- `/robot_na_czarnym_202603182240.jpeg` — industrial robot on black background
- `/AI_integration_custom_202603182243.jpeg` — AI/R&D integration image
- `/pobrane (4).png` — human hand reaching robot hand (About section)
- `/meralog.svg` — MERA logo SVG
- `/Isolation_Mode (3).svg` — favicon SVG

No screenshots or design mockup files are present in the repo.

---

### 7. Overall Aesthetic

**Futuristic premium minimalism** — strongly reminiscent of high-end tech companies like ElevenLabs, Linear, or Vercel (the film grain overlay is explicitly called "ElevenLabs style" in the code comments).

Specific characteristics:
- Pure black canvas with zero decorative color in UI chrome — all accent color is contained in animated WebGL backgrounds (blues/purples) that bleed through
- Monochromatic white-on-black with opacity as the sole hierarchy tool
- Square corners everywhere — zero border-radius
- Hairline borders (`1px`, `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)`) — near-invisible structure
- Dense information grids with `1–2px` gutters creating a compressed, technical mosaic
- Film grain texture adds analog/cinematic warmth to the otherwise cold digital aesthetic
- Generous whitespace (160px section padding) and tight typography (negative letter-spacing)
- Robot/hardware photography seamlessly blended into black background via gradient fade edges
- Uppercase micro-labels in extreme letter-spacing (`0.15–0.2em`) as section signposting
- No gradients, glows, or neon in the UI — those are reserved exclusively for WebGL layers

The overall aesthetic is best described as: **dark futuristic industrial** — premium, cold, technical, with cinematic photographic integration. Not cyberpunk (no neon/glow), not corporate (no blues/grays), not minimal-brutalist (has animation richness). Closest reference points: ElevenLabs website, Linear app, or a high-end robotics product launch site.
```

```text
@import "tailwindcss";

@theme {
  --font-grotesk: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
}

* {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
  background: #000;
  color: #fff;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

/* Film grain overlay — ElevenLabs style */
body::after {
  content: '';
  position: fixed;
  top: -50%;
  left: -50%;
  width: 200%;
  height: 200%;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 9999;
  background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 512 512' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.75' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.035'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  background-repeat: repeat;
  opacity: 0.6;
  animation: grain 8s steps(10) infinite;
}

@keyframes grain {
  0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
  10% { transform: translate(-5%, -10%); }
  20% { transform: translate(-15%, 5%); }
  30% { transform: translate(7%, -25%); }
  40% { transform: translate(-5%, 25%); }
  50% { transform: translate(-15%, 10%); }
  60% { transform: translate(15%, 0%); }
  70% { transform: translate(0%, 15%); }
  80% { transform: translate(3%, 35%); }
  90% { transform: translate(-10%, 10%); }
}

::selection {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
  color: #fff;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 4px;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: #000;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: #333;
  border-radius: 2px;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: #555;
}

#root {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  text-align: left;
}
```

```text
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom'
import { lazy, Suspense } from 'react'
import Navbar from './components/Navbar'
import LiquidEther from './components/LiquidEther'
import Hero from './components/Hero'
import Fleet from './components/Fleet'
import Solutions from './components/Solutions'
import Stats from './components/Stats'
import About from './components/About'
import Team from './components/Team'
// InvestmentHorizon merged into Solutions
import GrowthChart from './components/GrowthChart'
import Contact from './components/Contact'
import Footer from './components/Footer'

const AdminRoute = lazy(() => import('./admin/AdminRoute'))

function Landing() {
  return (
    <>
      <Navbar />
      <main style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }}>
        <div style={{ position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
          <div
            style={{
              position: 'absolute',
              top: 0,
              left: 0,
              width: '100%',
              height: '100%',
              zIndex: 0,
            }}
          >
            <LiquidEther
              colors={['#0a3d8f', '#0c5cb0', '#a3b6f0']}
              mouseForce={20}
              cursorSize={100}
              isViscous
              viscous={30}
              iterationsViscous={32}
              iterationsPoisson={32}
              resolution={0.5}
              isBounce={false}
              autoDemo
              autoSpeed={0.5}
              autoIntensity={2.2}
              takeoverDuration={0.25}
              autoResumeDelay={3000}
              autoRampDuration={0.6}
            />
          </div>
          <Hero />
        </div>
        <Stats />
        <Fleet />
        <Solutions />
        <About />
        <Team />
        <GrowthChart />
        <Contact />
      </main>
      <Footer />
    </>
  )
}

function App() {
  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<Landing />} />
        <Route path="/pl" element={<Landing />} />
        <Route path="/en" element={<Landing />} />
        <Route
          path="/admin"
          element={
            <Suspense fallback={
              <div style={{
                minHeight: '100vh',
                background: '#000',
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                justifyContent: 'center',
                color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)',
                fontFamily: "'Space Grotesk', sans-serif",
                fontSize: 14,
                letterSpacing: '0.1em',
              }}>
                Loading...
              </div>
            }>
              <AdminRoute />
            </Suspense>
          }
        />
      </Routes>
    </BrowserRouter>
  )
}

export default App
```

```text
import { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { ArrowRight, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react'
import ShinyText from './ShinyText'
import BlurText from './BlurText'
import { useLang } from '../i18n'

function DecryptedText({ text, speed = 30 }) {
  const [displayed, setDisplayed] = useState('')
  const chars = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'
  const idx = useRef(0)

  useEffect(() => {
    idx.current = 0
    setDisplayed('')
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      if (idx.current >= text.length) {
        clearInterval(interval)
        return
      }
      idx.current++
      const revealed = text.slice(0, idx.current)
      const scrambled = Array.from({ length: Math.min(3, text.length - idx.current) }, () =>
        chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)]
      ).join('')
      setDisplayed(revealed + scrambled)
    }, speed)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [text, speed])

  return <span>{displayed}</span>
}

export default function Hero() {
  const { t } = useLang()

  return (
    <section
      id="hero"
      style={{
        position: 'relative',
        minHeight: '100vh',
        display: 'flex',
        alignItems: 'center',
        overflow: 'hidden',
      }}

      {/* Grid: text left, image right — both vertically centered */}
      <div
        style={{
          position: 'relative',
          zIndex: 2,
          width: '100%',
          display: 'grid',
          gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr',
          gap: 0,
          alignItems: 'center',
          minHeight: '100vh',
        }}
        className="hero-grid"
      >
        {/* Left — Text */}
        <div style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 3, padding: '0 0 0 48px', maxWidth: 700 }}>
          {/* Subtitle with BlurText */}
          <div style={{
            fontSize: 12,
            fontWeight: 600,
            letterSpacing: '0.2em',
            textTransform: 'uppercase',
            color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.35)',
            marginBottom: 28,
          }}>
            <BlurText text={t('hero_subtitle')} delay={80} />
          </div>

          <motion.h1
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: 0.2 }}
            style={{
              fontSize: 'clamp(42px, 5.5vw, 82px)',
              fontWeight: 700,
              lineHeight: 0.95,
              letterSpacing: '-0.04em',
              color: '#fff',
              margin: 0,
            }}
          >
            <ShinyText
              text={t('hero_h1_line1')}
              speed={4}
              style={{
                fontSize: 'inherit',
                fontWeight: 'inherit',
                lineHeight: 'inherit',
                letterSpacing: 'inherit',
              }}
            />
            <br />
            <ShinyText
              text={t('hero_h1_line2')}

                fontSize: 'inherit',

                letterSpacing: 'inherit',
              }}
            />
            <br />

          <motion.div
```

```text
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
import { Menu, X } from 'lucide-react'
import { useLang } from '../i18n'

export default function Navbar() {
  const { lang, setLang, t } = useLang()
  const navigate = useNavigate()
  const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false)
  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false)

  const toggleLang = () => {
    const newLang = lang === 'en' ? 'pl' : 'en'
    setLang(newLang)
    navigate(newLang === 'en' ? '/' : '/pl', { replace: true })
  }

  const navLinks = [
    { label: t('nav_showcase'), href: '#showcase' },
    { label: t('nav_solutions'), href: '#solutions' },
    { label: t('nav_about'), href: '#about' },
    { label: t('nav_team'), href: '#team' },
    { label: t('nav_contact'), href: '#contact' },
  ]

  useEffect(() => {
    const onScroll = () => setScrolled(window.scrollY > 50)
    window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll)
    return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', onScroll)
  }, [])

  return (
    <nav
      style={{
        position: 'fixed',
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        right: 0,
        zIndex: 1000,
        padding: '0 48px',
        height: 72,
        display: 'flex',
        alignItems: 'center',
        justifyContent: 'space-between',
        background: scrolled ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.85)' : 'transparent',
        backdropFilter: scrolled ? 'blur(20px)' : 'none',
        borderBottom: scrolled ? '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)' : '1px solid transparent',
        transition: 'all 0.4s ease',
      }}
    >
      <a href="#" style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', textDecoration: 'none' }}>
        <img
          src="/meralog.svg"
          alt="MERA Robotics"
          style={{ height: 48, width: 'auto' }}
        />
      </a>

      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 40 }}>
        {navLinks.map((link) => (
          <a
            key={link.href}
            href={link.href}
            style={{
              color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)',
              textDecoration: 'none',
              fontSize: 13,
              fontWeight: 500,
              letterSpacing: '0.05em',
              textTransform: 'uppercase',
              transition: 'color 0.2s',
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = '#fff'}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)'}
            className="hidden md:block"
          >
            {link.label}
          </a>
        ))}

        {/* Language toggle */}
        <button
          onClick={toggleLang}
          style={{
            background: 'none',
            border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)',
            color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)',
            cursor: 'pointer',
            padding: '6px 14px',
            fontSize: 12,
            fontWeight: 600,
            fontFamily: "'Space Grotesk', sans-serif",
            letterSpacing: '0.08em',
            transition: 'all 0.2s',
          }}
          onMouseEnter={(e) => {
            e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)'
            e.currentTarget.style.color = '#fff'
          }}
          onMouseLeave={(e) => {
            e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)'
            e.currentTarget.style.color = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)'
          }}
        >
          {lang === 'en' ? 'PL' : 'EN'}
        </button>

        <a
          href="#contact"
          style={{
            padding: '10px 24px',
            background: '#fff',
            color: '#000',
            fontSize: 13,
            fontWeight: 600,
            letterSpacing: '0.05em',
            textTransform: 'uppercase',
            textDecoration: 'none',
            transition: 'opacity 0.2s',
          }}
          onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.opacity = '0.8'}
          onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.opacity = '1'}
          className="hidden md:block"
        >
          {t('nav_cta')}
        </a>

        <button
          onClick={() => setMobileOpen(!mobileOpen)}
          style={{
            background: 'none',
            border: 'none',
            color: '#fff',
            cursor: 'pointer',
            padding: 8,
          }}
          className="md:hidden"
        >
          {mobileOpen ? <X size={24} /> : <Menu size={24} />}
        </button>
      </div>

      <AnimatePresence>
        {mobileOpen && (
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}
            style={{
              position: 'absolute',
              top: 72,
              left: 0,
              right: 0,
              background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.95)',
              backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',
              padding: '32px 48px',
              display: 'flex',
              flexDirection: 'column',
              gap: 24,
              borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)',
            }}
          >
            {navLinks.map((link) => (
              <a
                key={link.href}
                href={link.href}
                onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
                style={{ color: '#fff', textDecoration: 'none', fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 500 }}
              >
                {link.label}
              </a>
            ))}
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>
    </nav>
  )
}
```

```text
}

}
```

```text
import { useRef, useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { motion, useInView } from 'framer-motion'
import { useLang } from '../i18n'

function AnimatedNumber({ value, suffix = '', prefix = '' }) {
  const ref = useRef(null)
  const isInView = useInView(ref, { once: true })
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isInView) return
    const end = value
    const duration = 2000
    const startTime = performance.now()
    const tick = (now) => {
      const elapsed = now - startTime
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1)
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3)
      setCurrent(Math.floor(eased * end))
      if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick)
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(tick)
  }, [isInView, value])

  return (
    <span ref={ref}>
      {prefix}{current.toLocaleString()}{suffix}
    </span>
  )
}

export default function Stats() {
  const ref = useRef(null)
  const isInView = useInView(ref, { once: true, margin: '-100px' })
  const { t } = useLang()

  const stats = [
    { value: 250, suffix: 'M+', label: t('stat_reach') },
    { value: 100, suffix: 'M+', prefix: '$', label: t('stat_brand') },
    { value: 1000, suffix: '+', label: t('stat_units') },
    { value: 47, suffix: '', label: t('stat_countries') },
  ]

  return (
    <section
      ref={ref}
      id="impact"
      style={{
        position: 'relative',
        zIndex: 2,
        borderTop: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)',
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)',
      }}
    >
      <div style={{
        maxWidth: 1400,
        margin: '0 auto',
        padding: '100px 48px',
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: 48,
      }}
        className="stats-grid"
      >
        {stats.map((stat, i) => (
          <motion.div
            key={stat.label}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }}
            animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: i * 0.1 }}
            style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}
          >
            <div style={{
              fontSize: 'clamp(36px, 5vw, 64px)',
              fontWeight: 700,
              letterSpacing: '-0.03em',
              color: '#fff',
              lineHeight: 1,
              fontVariantNumeric: 'tabular-nums',
            }}>
              <AnimatedNumber value={stat.value} suffix={stat.suffix} prefix={stat.prefix} />
            </div>
            <div style={{
              fontSize: 13,
              fontWeight: 500,
              letterSpacing: '0.1em',
              textTransform: 'uppercase',
              color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)',
              marginTop: 12,
            }}>
              {stat.label}
            </div>
          </motion.div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .stats-grid {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr) !important;
            gap: 32px !important;
            padding: 64px 24px !important;
          }
        }
      `}</style>
    </section>
  )
}
```

```text
import { useState, useRef } from 'react'
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
import { motion, useInView } from 'framer-motion'
import { Send, Mail, MapPin } from 'lucide-react'
import { supabase } from '../lib/supabase'
import { useLang } from '../i18n'

export default function Contact() {
  const ref = useRef(null)
  const isInView = useInView(ref, { once: true, margin: '-100px' })
  const { lang, setLang, t } = useLang()
  const navigate = useNavigate()
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', email: '', company: '', message: '' })
  const [status, setStatus] = useState(null)
  const [focused, setFocused] = useState(null)

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    setStatus('sending')
    try {
      if (supabase) {
        const { error } = await supabase.from('contacts').insert([{
          name: form.name, email: form.email, company: form.company,
          message: form.message, created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        }])
        if (error) throw error
      }
      setStatus('sent')
      setForm({ name: '', email: '', company: '', message: '' })
      setTimeout(() => setStatus(null), 4000)
    } catch {
      setStatus('error')
      setTimeout(() => setStatus(null), 4000)
    }
  }

  const inputStyle = (field) => ({
    width: '100%',
    padding: '16px 0',
    background: 'transparent',
    border: 'none',
    borderBottom: `1px solid ${focused === field ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'}`,
    color: '#fff',
    fontSize: 16,
    fontFamily: "'Space Grotesk', sans-serif",
    outline: 'none',
    transition: 'border-color 0.3s ease',
  })

  return (
    <section id="contact" ref={ref} style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 2, padding: '160px 48px', maxWidth: 1400, margin: '0 auto' }}>
      <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr', gap: 80 }} className="contact-grid">
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }}
          animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
          transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
        >
          <div style={{
            fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.15em',
            textTransform: 'uppercase', color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)', marginBottom: 16,
          }}>
            {t('contact_label')}
          </div>
          <h2 style={{
            fontSize: 'clamp(32px, 4vw, 56px)', fontWeight: 700,
            letterSpacing: '-0.03em', color: '#fff', lineHeight: 1.1, marginBottom: 32,
          }}>
            {t('contact_title1')} <span style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)' }}>{t('contact_title2')}</span>
          </h2>
          <p style={{ fontSize: 16, lineHeight: 1.7, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)', marginBottom: 48, maxWidth: 420 }}>
            {t('contact_desc')}
          </p>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 24 }}>
            <a href="mailto:contact@merarobotics.com" style={{
              display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 12,
              color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)', textDecoration: 'none', fontSize: 15, transition: 'color 0.2s',
            }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.color = '#fff'}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.color = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)'}
            >
              <Mail size={18} strokeWidth={1.5} /> contact@merarobotics.com
            </a>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 12, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)', fontSize: 15 }}>
              <MapPin size={18} strokeWidth={1.5} /> Warsaw, Poland · Global Operations
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{ marginTop: 48, paddingTop: 48, borderTop: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)' }}>
            <div style={{
              fontSize: 11, letterSpacing: '0.15em', textTransform: 'uppercase',
              color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)', marginBottom: 16,
            }}>
              {t('contact_also')}
            </div>
            <button
              onClick={() => { const nl = lang === 'en' ? 'pl' : 'en'; setLang(nl); navigate(nl === 'en' ? '/' : '/pl', { replace: true }); }}
              style={{
                background: 'none',
                border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15)',
                color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)',
                cursor: 'pointer',
                padding: '8px 18px',
                fontSize: 13,
                fontFamily: "'Space Grotesk', sans-serif",
                transition: 'all 0.2s',
              }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.color = '#fff'; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)' }}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.color = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)'; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' }}
            >
              {t('contact_pl')}
            </button>
          </div>
        </motion.div>

        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }}
          animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
          transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 0.2 }}
        >
          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 8 }}>
            <input type="text" placeholder={t('form_name')} required value={form.name}
              onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, name: e.target.value })}
              onFocus={() => setFocused('name')} onBlur={() => setFocused(null)}
              style={inputStyle('name')} />
            <input type="email" placeholder={t('form_email')} required value={form.email}
              onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, email: e.target.value })}
              onFocus={() => setFocused('email')} onBlur={() => setFocused(null)}
              style={inputStyle('email')} />
            <input type="text" placeholder={t('form_company')} value={form.company}
              onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, company: e.target.value })}
              onFocus={() => setFocused('company')} onBlur={() => setFocused(null)}
              style={inputStyle('company')} />
            <textarea placeholder={t('form_message')} required rows={4} value={form.message}
              onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, message: e.target.value })}
              onFocus={() => setFocused('message')} onBlur={() => setFocused(null)}
              style={{ ...inputStyle('message'), resize: 'none', fontFamily: "'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" }} />
            <button type="submit" disabled={status === 'sending'} style={{
              marginTop: 32, display: 'inline-flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
              gap: 10, padding: '18px 40px', background: '#fff', color: '#000', fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600,
              fontFamily: "'Space Grotesk', sans-serif", letterSpacing: '0.05em', textTransform: 'uppercase',
              border: 'none', cursor: status === 'sending' ? 'wait' : 'pointer', transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
              opacity: status === 'sending' ? 0.7 : 1,
            }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => { if (status !== 'sending') e.currentTarget.style.opacity = '0.85' }}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => { if (status !== 'sending') e.currentTarget.style.opacity = '1' }}
            >
              {status === 'sending' ? t('form_sending') : status === 'sent' ? t('form_sent') : t('form_send')}
              <Send size={14} />
            </button>
            {status === 'error' && <p style={{ color: '#ff6b6b', fontSize: 14, marginTop: 12 }}>{t('form_error')}</p>}
            {status === 'sent' && <p style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)', fontSize: 14, marginTop: 12 }}>{t('form_thanks')}</p>}
          </form>
        </motion.div>
      </div>
      <style>{`
        @media (max-width: 768px) { .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; gap: 48px !important; } }
        input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; }
      `}</style>
    </section>
  )
}
```

```text
export default function ShinyText({ text, speed = 3, className = '', style = {} }) {
  return (
    <span
      className={className}
      style={{
        ...style,
        display: 'inline-block',
        backgroundImage: 'linear-gradient(120deg, rgba(255,255,255,0) 40%, rgba(255,255,255,0.8) 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 60%)',
        backgroundSize: '200% 100%',
        WebkitBackgroundClip: 'text',
        backgroundClip: 'text',
        color: '#fff',
        animation: `shiny-text ${speed}s linear infinite`,
      }}
    >
      {text}
      <style>{`
        @keyframes shiny-text {
          0% { background-position: 100% 0; }
          100% { background-position: -100% 0; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </span>
  )
}
```

Fetch GrowthChart.jsx

`gh api repos/ma1orek/merarobotics/contents/src/components/GrowthChart.jsx --jq '.content' | base64 -d 2>&1`

```text
import { useRef } from 'react'
import { motion, useInView } from 'framer-motion'
import { useLang } from '../i18n'

export default function GrowthChart() {
  const ref = useRef(null)
  const isInView = useInView(ref, { once: true, margin: '-100px' })
  const { t } = useLang()

  // S-curve data points (we are at the very start)
  const points = [
    { x: 0, y: 2 },
    { x: 10, y: 3 },
    { x: 20, y: 5 },   // ← "You are here"
    { x: 30, y: 9 },
    { x: 40, y: 16 },
    { x: 50, y: 28 },
    { x: 60, y: 42 },
    { x: 70, y: 58 },
    { x: 80, y: 72 },
    { x: 90, y: 86 },
    { x: 100, y: 100 },
  ]

  const w = 800
  const h = 300
  const padL = 40
  const padB = 40
  const padT = 20
  const padR = 20
  const chartW = w - padL - padR
  const chartH = h - padT - padB

  const toX = (v) => padL + (v / 100) * chartW
  const toY = (v) => padT + chartH - (v / 100) * chartH

  const pathD = points.map((p, i) => {
    const x = toX(p.x)
    const y = toY(p.y)
    if (i === 0) return `M ${x} ${y}`
    const prev = points[i - 1]
    const cx = (toX(prev.x) + x) / 2
    return `C ${cx} ${toY(prev.y)}, ${cx} ${y}, ${x} ${y}`
  }).join(' ')

  // "You are here" marker at x=20
  const markerX = toX(20)
  const markerY = toY(5)

  return (
    <section
      ref={ref}
      style={{
        position: 'relative',
        zIndex: 2,
        padding: '120px 48px',
        borderTop: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)',
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)',
      }}
    >
      <div style={{ maxWidth: 1400, margin: '0 auto' }}>
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
          animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
          transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
          style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: 60 }}
        >
          <div style={{
            fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.15em',
            textTransform: 'uppercase', color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)', marginBottom: 16,
          }}>
            {t('chart_label')}
          </div>
          <h2 style={{
            fontSize: 'clamp(28px, 3.5vw, 48px)', fontWeight: 700,
            letterSpacing: '-0.03em', color: '#fff', lineHeight: 1.1,
          }}>
            {t('chart_title1')} <span style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)' }}>{t('chart_title2')}</span>
          </h2>
          <p style={{
            fontSize: 16, lineHeight: 1.7, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)',
            maxWidth: 560, margin: '24px auto 0',
          }}>
            {t('chart_desc')}
          </p>
        </motion.div>

        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
          animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1 } : {}}
          transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: 0.3 }}
          style={{
            display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center',
            overflow: 'hidden',
          }}
        >
          <svg
            viewBox={`0 0 ${w} ${h}`}
            style={{ width: '100%', maxWidth: 800, height: 'auto' }}
          >
            {/* Grid lines */}
            {[0, 25, 50, 75, 100].map((v) => (
              <line
                key={v}
                x1={padL} y1={toY(v)} x2={w - padR} y2={toY(v)}
                stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" strokeWidth="1"
              />
            ))}

            {/* Axis labels */}
            <text x={padL - 8} y={toY(0) + 4} textAnchor="end" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" fontSize="12" fontWeight="600" fontFamily="Space Grotesk">
              {t('chart_now')}
            </text>
            <text x={w - padR + 4} y={toY(100) + 4} textAnchor="start" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" fontSize="12" fontWeight="600" fontFamily="Space Grotesk">
              {t('chart_future')}
            </text>

            {/* S-curve path */}
            <motion.path
              d={pathD}
              fill="none"
              stroke="#fff"
              strokeWidth="3"
              initial={{ pathLength: 0 }}
              animate={isInView ? { pathLength: 1 } : {}}
              transition={{ duration: 2.5, ease: 'easeInOut', delay: 0.5 }}
            />

            {/* Filled area under curve */}
            <motion.path
              d={`${pathD} L ${toX(100)} ${toY(0)} L ${toX(0)} ${toY(0)} Z`}
              fill="url(#chartGrad)"
              initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
              animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1 } : {}}
              transition={{ duration: 1.5, delay: 1.5 }}
            />

            <defs>
              <linearGradient id="chartGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                <stop offset="0%" stopColor="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" />
                <stop offset="100%" stopColor="rgba(255,255,255,0)" />
              </linearGradient>
            </defs>

            {/* "You are here" marker */}
            <motion.g
              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0 }}
              animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, scale: 1 } : {}}
              transition={{ duration: 0.5, delay: 2 }}
            >
              <circle cx={markerX} cy={markerY} r="10" fill="#fff" />
              <circle cx={markerX} cy={markerY} r="16" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" strokeWidth="1.5">
                <animate attributeName="r" values="14;28;14" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
                <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.5;0;0.5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
              </circle>

              {/* Label */}
              <rect x={markerX - 70} y={markerY - 50} width="140" height="28" rx="3" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" />
              <text x={markerX} y={markerY - 31} textAnchor="middle" fill="#fff" fontSize="14" fontWeight="700" fontFamily="Space Grotesk" letterSpacing="0.12em">
                {t('chart_here')}
              </text>
            </motion.g>

            {/* Phase labels along bottom */}
            {[
              { x: 15, label: t('chart_phase1') },
              { x: 45, label: t('chart_phase2') },
              { x: 80, label: t('chart_phase3') },
            ].map((p) => (
              <text
                key={p.x}
                x={toX(p.x)} y={h - 10}
                textAnchor="middle"
                fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" fontSize="12" fontWeight="500" fontFamily="Space Grotesk"
                letterSpacing="0.1em"
              >
                {p.label}
              </text>
            ))}
          </svg>
        </motion.div>

        {/* CTA */}
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
          animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
          transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: 2.5 }}
          style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginTop: 48 }}
        >
          <a
            href="#contact"
            style={{
              display: 'inline-flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 10,
              padding: '16px 40px', background: '#fff', color: '#000',
              fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.05em',
              textTransform: 'uppercase', textDecoration: 'none',
              transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.opacity = '0.85'
              e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(-2px)'
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.opacity = '1'
              e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(0)'
            }}
          >
            {t('chart_cta')}
          </a>
        </motion.div>
      </div>
    </section>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
import { useRef } from 'react'
import { motion, useInView } from 'framer-motion'
import { useLang } from '../i18n'

export default function About() {
  const ref = useRef(null)
  const isInView = useInView(ref, { once: true, margin: '-100px' })
  const { t } = useLang()

  return (
    <section
      id="about"
      ref={ref}
      style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 2, padding: '160px 0', maxWidth: '100%', overflow: 'hidden' }}
    >
      {/* Full-width image with fade edges */}
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
        animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1 } : {}}
        transition={{ duration: 1 }}
        style={{
          position: 'relative',
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: 1100,
          margin: '0 auto 80px',
          overflow: 'hidden',
        }}
      >
        <img
          src="/pobrane (4).png"
          alt="Human hand reaching robot hand"
          style={{
            width: '100%',
            height: 'auto',
            display: 'block',
            filter: 'brightness(1.05)',
          }}
        />
        {/* Left fade */}
        <div style={{
          position: 'absolute',
          top: 0, left: 0,
          width: '20%', height: '100%',
          background: 'linear-gradient(to right, #000 0%, transparent 100%)',
          pointerEvents: 'none',
        }} />
        {/* Right fade */}
        <div style={{
          position: 'absolute',
          top: 0, right: 0,
          width: '20%', height: '100%',
          background: 'linear-gradient(to left, #000 0%, transparent 100%)',
          pointerEvents: 'none',
        }} />
        {/* Top fade */}
        <div style={{
          position: 'absolute',
          top: 0, left: 0,
          width: '100%', height: '25%',
          background: 'linear-gradient(to bottom, #000 0%, transparent 100%)',
          pointerEvents: 'none',
        }} />
        {/* Bottom fade */}
        <div style={{
          position: 'absolute',
          bottom: 0, left: 0,
          width: '100%', height: '25%',
          background: 'linear-gradient(to top, #000 0%, transparent 100%)',
          pointerEvents: 'none',
        }} />
      </motion.div>

      {/* Text content */}
      <div style={{ maxWidth: 1400, margin: '0 auto', padding: '0 48px' }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr', gap: 80, alignItems: 'start' }} className="about-grid">
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }}
            animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
            transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: 0.2 }}
          >
            <div style={{
              fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.15em',
              textTransform: 'uppercase', color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)', marginBottom: 16,
            }}>
              {t('about_label')}
            </div>
            <h2 style={{
              fontSize: 'clamp(28px, 3.5vw, 48px)', fontWeight: 700,
              letterSpacing: '-0.03em', color: '#fff', lineHeight: 1.1, marginBottom: 32,
            }}>
              {t('about_title1')} <span style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)' }}>{t('about_title2')}</span>
            </h2>
            <p style={{ fontSize: 16, lineHeight: 1.8, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.45)', marginBottom: 24 }}>
              {t('about_p1')}
            </p>
            <p style={{ fontSize: 16, lineHeight: 1.8, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.45)' }}>
              {t('about_p2')}
            </p>
          </motion.div>

          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }}
            animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
            transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: 0.4 }}
          >
            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr', gap: 40 }}>
              {[
                { num: '2026', label: t('about_founded') },
                { num: '47', label: t('about_markets') },
                { num: '10+', label: t('about_team') },
                { num: '24/7', label: t('about_support') },
              ].map((item) => (
                <div key={item.label}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 36, fontWeight: 700, color: '#fff', letterSpacing: '-0.02em' }}>
                    {item.num}
                  </div>
                  <div style={{
                    fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 500, letterSpacing: '0.1em',
                    textTransform: 'uppercase', color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)', marginTop: 4,
                  }}>
                    {item.label}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </motion.div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; gap: 48px !important; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </section>
  )
}
```

```text
import { useRef } from 'react'
import { motion, useInView } from 'framer-motion'
import { useLang } from '../i18n'
import SoftAurora from './SoftAurora'

const team = [
  {
    nameKey: 'team_rad_name',
    roleKey: 'team_rad_role',
    descKey: 'team_rad_desc',
    initials: 'RG',
  },
  {
    nameKey: 'team_bart_name',
    roleKey: 'team_bart_role',
    descKey: 'team_bart_desc',
    initials: 'BI',
  },
  {
    nameKey: 'team_kam_name',
    roleKey: 'team_kam_role',
    descKey: 'team_kam_desc',
    initials: 'KF',
  },
]

export default function Team() {
  const ref = useRef(null)
  const isInView = useInView(ref, { once: true, margin: '-100px' })
  const { t } = useLang()

  return (
    <section
      id="team"
      ref={ref}
      style={{
        position: 'relative',
        zIndex: 2,
        padding: '160px 48px',
        maxWidth: 1400,
        margin: '0 auto',
        overflow: 'visible',
      }}
    >
      {/* SoftAurora background — full viewport width */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: '50%', transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
        width: '100vw', height: '100%', zIndex: 0, pointerEvents: 'none', opacity: 0.7,
        overflow: 'hidden',
      }}>
        <SoftAurora
          speed={0.6} scale={1.5} brightness={0.8}
          color1="#1e38fa" color2="#5211e8"
          noiseFrequency={2.5} noiseAmplitude={1}
          bandHeight={0.5} bandSpread={1} octaveDecay={0.1}
          layerOffset={0} colorSpeed={1}
          enableMouseInteraction mouseInfluence={0.25}
        />
      </div>
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
        animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
        transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
        style={{ marginBottom: 80, position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }}
      >
        <div style={{
          fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.15em',
          textTransform: 'uppercase', color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)', marginBottom: 16,
        }}>
          {t('team_label')}
        </div>
        <h2 style={{
          fontSize: 'clamp(32px, 4vw, 56px)', fontWeight: 700,
          letterSpacing: '-0.03em', color: '#fff', lineHeight: 1.1,
        }}>
          {t('team_title1')} <span style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)' }}>{t('team_title2')}</span>
        </h2>
      </motion.div>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, 1fr)',
        gap: 1,
        position: 'relative',
        zIndex: 1,
      }}
        className="team-grid"
      >
        {team.map((member, i) => (
          <motion.div
            key={member.nameKey}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }}
            animate={isInView ? { opacity: 1, y: 0 } : {}}
            transition={{ duration: 0.6, delay: i * 0.15 }}
            style={{
              padding: 40,
              background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.02)',
              border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)',
              transition: 'all 0.4s ease',
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)'
              e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)'
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.02)'
              e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)'
            }}
          >
            {/* Initials avatar */}
            <div style={{
              width: 56, height: 56,
              border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12)',
              display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
              fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)',
              letterSpacing: '0.05em',
              marginBottom: 28,
            }}>
              {member.initials}
            </div>

            <h3 style={{
              fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: '#fff',
              letterSpacing: '-0.01em', marginBottom: 4,
            }}>
              {t(member.nameKey)}
            </h3>

            <div style={{
              fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.15em',
              textTransform: 'uppercase', color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)',
              marginBottom: 20,
            }}>
              {t(member.roleKey)}
            </div>

            <p style={{
              fontSize: 14, lineHeight: 1.7, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)',
            }}>
              {t(member.descKey)}
            </p>
          </motion.div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
          .team-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </section>
  )
}
```

## MERA Robotics — Complete Design Language Report

### 1. Repository Overview

The repository `ma1orek/merarobotics` is a **private** React single-page application for a humanoid robotics company called MERA Robotics, taglined "Architects of the Future." It is a marketing/investor landing page with a Polish/English language toggle. It was created March 18, 2026 and last pushed March 25, 2026. There is no README file present in the repo.

---

### 2. Tech Stack

**package.json** reveals:

- **Framework:** React 19 + Vite 8
- **Routing:** react-router-dom 7
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4 (via `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin — no separate config file, inline `@theme` in CSS)
- **Animation:** Framer Motion 12
- **Icons:** lucide-react
- **3D / WebGL:** `ogl` (WebGL) + `three.js` — used for the `LiquidEther` fluid simulation
- **Backend:** Supabase (contact form submissions)
- **Voice:** `@elevenlabs/react` (ElevenLabs voice AI integration)
- **Language:** JavaScript (JSX), no TypeScript
- **Deployment:** Netlify

There is no `tailwind.config.js` — Tailwind v4 is configured entirely within `src/index.css` using the `@theme` block.

---

### 3. Color Palette / Design Tokens

Defined in `src/index.css` and component inline styles. The palette is extremely minimal — monochromatic black and white with opacity layering:

| Role | Value |
|---|---|
| Background | `#000` (pure black) |
| Primary text | `#fff` (pure white) |
| Secondary text | `rgba(255,255,255,0.45)` |
| Muted text | `rgba(255,255,255,0.3)` |
| Dim text / labels | `rgba(255,255,255,0.2–0.25)` |
| Card background | `rgba(255,255,255,0.02)` |
| Card border | `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` |
| Card border (hover) | `rgba(255,255,255,0.12–0.15)` |
| Divider lines | `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` |
| CTA button bg | `#fff` with `color: #000` (inverted) |
| Ghost button border | `rgba(255,255,255,0.2)` |
| Navbar bg (scrolled) | `rgba(0,0,0,0.85)` + `blur(20px)` |
| Mobile menu bg | `rgba(0,0,0,0.95)` + `blur(20px)` |

**Accent colors** (used only in animated backgrounds, not UI chrome):

- Hero background: `LiquidEther` fluid sim colored `['#0a3d8f', '#0c5cb0', '#a3b6f0']` — deep blues and periwinkle
- Team section: `SoftAurora` with `color1="#1e38fa"` (electric blue) and `color2="#5211e8"` (deep violet/purple)

**Scrollbar:** `width: 4px`, track `#000`, thumb `#333` → hover `#555`

---

### 4. Typography

**Font family:** `Space Grotesk` (Google Fonts) — exclusively used throughout.

Weights loaded: 300, 400, 500, 600, 700.

Registered as a Tailwind v4 theme token: `--font-grotesk: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif`

**Typographic scale and style patterns:**

| Usage | Size | Weight | Letter-spacing | Case |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Hero H1 | `clamp(42px, 5.5vw, 82px)` | 700 | `-0.04em` | Mixed |
| Section H2 | `clamp(32px, 4vw, 56px)` | 700 | `-0.03em` | Mixed |
| Card H3 | 20–22px | 600–700 | `-0.01–0.02em` | Mixed |
| Body / desc | 15–17px | 400 | normal | Normal |
| Section labels (eyebrow) | 12–13px | 600 | `0.15–0.2em` | UPPERCASE |
| Card tags | 9–10px | 600–700 | `0.2em` | UPPERCASE |
| Nav links | 13px | 500 | `0.05em` | UPPERCASE |
| Stat numbers | `clamp(36px, 5vw, 64px)` | 700 | `-0.03em` | — |
| Muted/ghost lines in H1 | Same as H1 | Same | Same | — applied via `rgba(255,255,255,0.3)` |

**Key typographic effect:** The third line of the hero H1 renders at `rgba(255,255,255,0.3)` making it appear "ghost-dim" — a typographic contrast device. Section titles split into bright + dim parts (`"Build the Future" <span color=rgba(255,255,255,0.25)>Together</span>`).

---

### 5. Key UI Components and Visual Style

**Overall theme: Pure dark — no light mode.**

**Card system (used in Fleet, Solutions, Team):**
- Background: `rgba(255,255,255,0.02)` — near-invisible frosted card
- Border: `1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` — hairline
- Hover: background lifts to `rgba(255,255,255,0.04)`, border brightens to `rgba(255,255,255,0.12)`
- No border-radius — sharp square corners throughout
- Gap between grid items: `1–2px` (grid gap), creating a tightly-packed mosaic effect

**Buttons:**
- Primary CTA: solid white background (`#fff`), black text, no border-radius (square), uppercase, `font-weight: 600`, `letter-spacing: 0.05em`, hover lifts `translateY(-2px)` and fades to `opacity: 0.85–0.9`
- Ghost/outline button: transparent background, `1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)` border, white text, hover brightens border to `rgba(255,255,255,0.5)`, lifts `translateY(-2px)`
- Language toggle: same ghost style, tighter padding

**Navbar:**
- Fixed, 72px tall, `padding: 0 48px`
- Transparent on top, transitions to `rgba(0,0,0,0.85)` with `backdrop-filter: blur(20px)` + hairline bottom border on scroll
- Logo: SVG file `/meralog.svg` at `height: 48px`

**Form inputs (Contact):**
- Borderless except bottom border: `1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)`, activates to `rgba(255,255,255,0.4)` on focus
- Transparent background, white text, `Space Grotesk` font
- Submit button: same solid white CTA button style

**Image treatment:**
- Robot/product images bleed to edges with CSS gradient fade overlays on all sides (black-to-transparent linear-gradient), merging images seamlessly into the black background — a defining visual signature
- Images scale `1.05` on hover via CSS transition

**Sections:**
- All sections separated by `border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` hairlines
- Section padding: `160px 48px` (generous vertical breathing room)
- Max-width container: `1400px`, centered

**Animated effects:**
- `ShinyText`: sweeping shimmer gradient (`linear-gradient(120deg, transparent 40%, rgba(255,255,255,0.8) 50%, transparent 60%)`) animated via `background-position` — used on hero H1
- `BlurText`: blur-in animation per character — used on subtitles and scroll indicator
- `DecryptedText`: character scramble reveal (matrix-style) — used on hero H1 third line
- `LiquidEther`: full WebGL fluid simulation (OGL-based) in hero background, colored in blue tones (`#0a3d8f`, `#0c5cb0`, `#a3b6f0`), mouse-interactive
- `SoftAurora`: GLSL shader aurora in Team section background, electric blue + purple
- Film grain overlay: animated SVG fractalNoise texture at `opacity: 0.6` over entire page via `body::after` — described in code as "ElevenLabs style"
- `GrowthChart`: animated SVG S-curve with pulsing "You are here" marker

**Scroll animations:** All sections use `framer-motion` `useInView` with `once: true` — elements fade + slide up 20–40px on entry.

---

### 6. Visual References / Assets in `/public`

From image filenames referenced in components:

- `/close_u_hiper_202603181342 1 (1).png` — hero robot hand closeup photo
- `/pobrane (3).png` — "Edward" humanoid robot photo
- `/Robota_unitree_g1_202603182237.jpeg` — Unitree G1 service robot
- `/robot_na_czarnym_202603182240.jpeg` — industrial robot on black background
- `/AI_integration_custom_202603182243.jpeg` — AI/R&D integration image
- `/pobrane (4).png` — human hand reaching robot hand (About section)
- `/meralog.svg` — MERA logo SVG
- `/Isolation_Mode (3).svg` — favicon SVG

No screenshots or design mockup files are present in the repo.

---

### 7. Overall Aesthetic

**Futuristic premium minimalism** — strongly reminiscent of high-end tech companies like ElevenLabs, Linear, or Vercel (the film grain overlay is explicitly called "ElevenLabs style" in the code comments).

Specific characteristics:
- Pure black canvas with zero decorative color in UI chrome — all accent color is contained in animated WebGL backgrounds (blues/purples) that bleed through
- Monochromatic white-on-black with opacity as the sole hierarchy tool
- Square corners everywhere — zero border-radius
- Hairline borders (`1px`, `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)`) — near-invisible structure
- Dense information grids with `1–2px` gutters creating a compressed, technical mosaic
- Film grain texture adds analog/cinematic warmth to the otherwise cold digital aesthetic
- Generous whitespace (160px section padding) and tight typography (negative letter-spacing)
- Robot/hardware photography seamlessly blended into black background via gradient fade edges
- Uppercase micro-labels in extreme letter-spacing (`0.15–0.2em`) as section signposting
- No gradients, glows, or neon in the UI — those are reserved exclusively for WebGL layers

The overall aesthetic is best described as: **dark futuristic industrial** — premium, cold, technical, with cinematic photographic integration. Not cyberpunk (no neon/glow), not corporate (no blues/grays), not minimal-brutalist (has animation richness). Closest reference points: ElevenLabs website, Linear app, or a high-end robotics product launch site.
